title: Jasper Counts Hugs
synopsis: Baby Jasper discovers counting from one to five as he receives warm hugs from his diverse family members throughout the day, creating a cozy pattern of love and numbers that babies can predict and enjoy.

illustration.description: A young Black woman with natural curly hair in a soft yellow sweater holds baby Jasper, a mixed-race toddler with warm brown skin and curly dark hair. They're in a sunny kitchen with pastel yellow walls. Mama's face shows pure joy as she gives Jasper a gentle squeeze. Soft morning light streams through a window with sheer white curtains.
illustration.alt: Mama giving Jasper his first hug of the day in a warm kitchen

pages.text: Two hugs from Daddy. Squeeze, squeeze!

illustration.description: A tall Latino man with short dark hair and a soft blue shirt kneels down to hug Jasper in the living room. The room has warm peach walls and a cozy beige sofa. Daddy's strong arms wrap gently around the toddler, both smiling broadly. A few colorful board books are scattered on a low wooden coffee table nearby.
illustration.alt: Daddy giving Jasper two warm hugs in the living room

pages.text: Three hugs from Grandma. Squeeze, squeeze, squeeze!

illustration.description: An elderly Black woman with silver-gray hair in a soft purple cardigan sits in a comfortable rocking chair, holding Jasper on her lap. They're on a front porch with white railings and hanging flower baskets. Grandma's weathered hands gently hold Jasper as she rocks back and forth. Pink and white petunias bloom in the background.
illustration.alt: Grandma rocking and hugging Jasper on the front porch

pages.text: Four hugs from Grandpa. Squeeze, squeeze, squeeze, squeeze!

illustration.description: A gentle Asian man with gray hair and wire-rimmed glasses sits cross-legged on a soft mint green rug in the playroom. He has Jasper in his lap, both surrounded by wooden blocks and soft plush toys. Grandpa wears a cozy cream-colored sweater and has laugh lines around his kind eyes. Afternoon sunlight creates a warm glow through sheer curtains.
illustration.alt: Grandpa playing with and hugging Jasper in the playroom

pages.text: Five hugs from big sister Ana. Squeeze, squeeze, squeeze, squeeze, squeeze!

illustration.description: A 6-year-old girl with caramel skin and long wavy brown hair in two braids sits on Jasper's toddler bed. She wears a soft pink t-shirt with a rainbow on it. Ana wraps her arms around her little brother protectively, both sitting on a bed with white sheets and a colorful patchwork quilt. The bedroom has soft lavender walls with simple white furniture.
illustration.alt: Big sister Ana giving Jasper five loving hugs on his bed

pages.text: Count with Jasper! One, two, three, four, five!

illustration.description: All five family members sit together on the living room floor in a circle around Jasper, who sits in the center clapping his hands. Each person holds up fingers showing their number - Mama shows one, Daddy shows two, and so on. The scene is bathed in warm golden evening light. Everyone has joyful expressions, creating a cozy family gathering on a soft cream-colored area rug.
illustration.alt: The whole family counting together with Jasper in the center

pages.text: So many hugs! Jasper giggles. Hee-hee!

illustration.description: Close-up of baby Jasper's delighted face as he claps his chubby hands together, mouth open in a big laugh. His dark curly hair catches the light and his brown eyes sparkle with joy. The background is soft and blurred, showing hints of his colorful family gathered around him. Warm peach and cream tones dominate the scene.
illustration.alt: Jasper laughing joyfully after counting all his family hugs

pages.text: Sweet dreams, little counter. Shh... shh...

illustration.description: Jasper sleeps peacefully in his crib, covered by a soft white blanket with tiny star patterns. Mama and Daddy stand together beside the crib, Daddy's arm around Mama's shoulders. A small nightlight casts a gentle warm glow on the pale blue nursery walls. Through the window, a crescent moon and a few stars are visible in the dusky purple sky.
illustration.alt: Jasper sleeping peacefully as his parents watch over him

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who gave Jasper one hug?
questions.explanation: Mama gave Jasper one hug first thing in the morning!

questions.question: How many hugs did big sister Ana give?
questions.explanation: Ana gave Jasper five hugs - the most of everyone!

questions.question: What sound did Jasper make when he was happy?
questions.explanation: Jasper said 'Hee-hee!' when he giggled about all his hugs!
